about.title: About Us | From the Stress
about.desc: From the Stress to the Best: Turning pressure into a radiant identity. The story of F.T.S streetwear brand and our mission to accompany Gen Stress.
about.heading: ABOUT US
about.subheading: From the Stress to the Best: Turning pressure into a radiant identity.
about.sec1Desc: From the Stress (F.T.S) was born not just as a mere fashion brand, but as a journey to find balance amidst the hustle and bustle of modern life. Founded by Dang Hoang Dai Nghia, F.T.S is the convergence of a passion for design and the desire to transform heavy emotions into a bold source of artistic energy.
about.sec2Desc: We call our customers Gen Stress — a dynamic young generation but also full of worries about their careers, studies, and life. In that rushing stream, F.T.S understands that mental health is an important puzzle piece that needs attention. We believe that everyone is like chess pieces on the board of life; whether it's the powerful "Queen" or the one carrying the weighty "Heavy Crown", all require resilience to overcome pressure (stress) and achieve success.
about.sec3Desc: F.T.S's streetwear style is an intersection of high applicability and unique design language. From the liberal, dusty Boxy-fit shapes to the seductive tight-fitting Baby Tees, every product is meticulously crafted from premium fabrics to iconic graphics. With us, fashion is how you face the world: You don't have to hide from pressure, wear it, master it, and turn it into your own style.
about.sec4Desc: The mission of From the Stress is to be your companion on the path of mental health care through confidence and a radiant appearance. We are committed to delivering real value, helping you affirm your distinct "self" and always proudly marching forward just like our spirit: From the Stress to the Best.
about.welcome: Welcome to the community of bravery and freedom.

privacy.title: Customer Privacy Policy
privacy.desc: Privacy policy for personal information and customer data at FROM THE STRESS.
privacy.s1Desc: We only collect necessary information to process orders and contact for delivery: full name, phone number, address, email. Information is entered directly by the customer during checkout.
privacy.s2Desc: Information is only used for the purpose of order confirmation, delivery, and customer support. We do not sell or transfer personal data to third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.s3Desc: Data is stored securely and only responsible personnel can access it. We apply appropriate technical measures and procedures to limit information leaks.
privacy.s4Desc: For any questions about the privacy policy or requests to edit/delete personal information, please contact via the information on the website.

returns.title: Return and Refund Policy
returns.desc: Conditions for returns, refunds, and product warranties at FROM THE STRESS.
returns.s1Desc: Products can be exchanged/returned within 07 days from receipt, intact, unused or unwashed. Defective products from the manufacturer or incorrectly delivered orders are prioritized for return processing.
returns.s2Desc: Used, washed products, tags removed; underwear, sportswear (except manufacturer defects); special promotional products (if specific rules apply). Some product groups may have private conditions, please see on the product page.
returns.s3Desc: Contact via email or hotline to report the reason and send product photos (if defective). Once confirmed, you send the goods back to the address we provide. After inspection, we will exchange a new product or process a refund according to policy.
returns.s4Desc: Refunds are made within 5–7 working days after return confirmation. Money is refunded via the original payment method or bank transfer based on your provided information.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery Policy
shipping.desc: Shipping policy, delivery fees, and estimated times at FROM THE STRESS.
shipping.s1Desc: We deliver nationwide. Orders are processed and delivered via reputable carriers. Estimated delivery time is 2–7 days depending on the area.
shipping.s2Desc: Shipping fee is calculated per order. Orders from 500,000₫ and above are usually eligible for free shipping (applicable according to current promotions). Fee details will be shown at checkout.
shipping.s3Desc: After placing an order, you receive a confirmation email. Staff will contact to confirm and report delivery progress. You can track orders via link in email or contact us directly.
shipping.s4Desc: When receiving goods, please check quantity, product and external condition. If there is an error or damage, report back immediately to the shipper or contact us within 24-48 hours.

referralPolicy.title: Referral Policy
referralPolicy.desc: Referral program for friends to receive discount offers at FROM THE STRESS.
referralPolicy.s1Content: The FROM THE STRESS referral program allows customers to share a personal referral code so friends receive discounts on product purchases. Each account will be provided a unique referral code securely after registration.
referralPolicy.s2i1: The referee must be a new customer (has never used a referral code before).
referralPolicy.s2i2: The referee must create an account on the website.
referralPolicy.s2i3: Each account can only use a referral code once.
referralPolicy.s2i4: Referral codes cannot be combined with other promotional programs.
referralPolicy.s2i5: The order must meet a minimum value requirement (if applicable).
referralPolicy.s3i1: Referee: Receives a percentage or fixed amount discount set by the system.
referralPolicy.s3i2: Referrer: Receives a reward (if the program applies rewards to referrers).
referralPolicy.s4i1: Self-referring (using your own code) is strictly prohibited.
referralPolicy.s4i2: Creating multiple fake accounts to use referral codes is prohibited.
referralPolicy.s4i3: The system holds the right to refuse or revoke offers if fraudulent behavior is detected.
referralPolicy.s4i4: Violating accounts may be permanently banned.
referralPolicy.s5i2: Withdrawal requests will be reviewed by admins within 3-5 working days.
referralPolicy.s5i3: Commissions are only credited when the order is completed and payment is confirmed.
referralPolicy.s6Content: FROM THE STRESS reserves the right to change or stop the referral program at any time without prior notice. Any changes will be updated on this page.

buyingGuide.title: Buying Guide & Payment
buyingGuide.desc: Ordering and payment guide at FROM THE STRESS. Safe and convenient shopping steps.
buyingGuide.s1Content2: section, choose the appropriate size and color, click "Add to cart".
buyingGuide.s2Content2: , check the order and click "Checkout". Fill in full delivery information and email.
buyingGuide.s3Content: After ordering, you will receive a confirmation email. We will contact to confirm and deliver in the shortest time.
buyingGuide.s4Content: Currently we apply cash on delivery (COD). Bank transfer or e-wallet methods may be updated later.
